channel.title: Symlink on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Symlink on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist

item.title: Fix Broken Symlink Cleanup in Large Linux Deployments
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn safe broken symlink cleanup in Linux using a minimal Bash script to detect and remove stale links across mounted directories in Docker.
